site.title: Charis Barbosa - Digital and Graphic Designer
site.description: I'm a Digital & Graphic Designer with over 10 years of experience in branding and visual design. I'm currently expanding into web design and UI/UX, focusing on creating designs that are both clear and easy to use. I have a strong passion for typography and layout, and I enjoy crafting designs that are not only visually appealing but also highly functional. My goal is to create designs that effectively communicate the intended message while providing an enjoyable user experience.

intro.name: Gianmarco Cavallo
intro.summary: a software developer with strong focus on the user experience, animations and micro interactions

supportLink.imageAlt: Buy Me a Coffee at ko-fi.com

about.title: About me
about.intro: Hi, I'm Gianmarco, a front-end software developer from Italy.
about.toolsIntro: My primary tools of choice includes:
about.passion: Beyond coding, I'm passionate about design, illustration, animation and 3D modelling and traveling. An unusual hobby of mine is collecting vintage passports, they're interesting pieces of history to me.
about.approach: While I have some preferred tools, I always choose the best one for the job, even if it's not on my usual list. My goal is to find the right solution for each project.
